title: Past deal — 1842 Riverbend Ct (closed 2026-02)
text: 1842 Riverbend Ct — buyer represented by Hadley, list price 612K, closed at 605K with $4K seller credit toward closing costs. Inspection raised an HVAC condenser concern; seller credited $1.8K rather than repair. Closing attorney: Stovall & Brown. Wiring instructions delivered by phone, never email — keep that practice on every future deal.
